prompt: Create a comparison diagram titled 'Coherence Beats Compliance'. On the left show visible compliance: ceremonies, templates, dashboards, checklists, and process language. On the right show operating coherence: aligned decisions, incentives, language, trust, execution, and feedback. Include a central distinction: process performance can look green while the operating system remains fragmented. Use restrained enterprise design and avoid caricature.
proof_boundaries: Do not imply that process or compliance is inherently useless.
Do not include unsupported transformation statistics.
Show coherence as a system property, not universal agreement.
